title: LD: A life's dungeon
description: Have you ever wished to play Minecraft dungeons but still wanted the open world? Wait no more! "A life's dungeon" modpack fixes that!
body:
![Title card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74fc7d537de135579a4503e70042597e8ea3b2c8_0.webp)
# What is it?
A life's dungeon is a modpack aiming to recreate **the feel of MInecraft: Dungeons.**

**With 140+ mods** that optimize the game or add new mobs, structures and blocks you will never run out of content.

## But wait there's more!
The modpack is **pretty difficult** and cannot be beaten in a day or two (that is if you're going for all the dungeons, there's a lot of dungeons so it will take time).

**There are also mods like:**
- Atmospherics
- Better Archeology
- Better Combat
- Crop Critters
- Cinderscapes
- Terrestria
- Inferno
- Enderscape
- Almost all Dungeons & Taverns mods
- **And more..!**

## Getting started?
**Here are some steps on how to start your brand new adventure!**
- Step 1: Loot your spawn village,
- Step 2: Get better gear,
- Step 3: Search for a tavern to find maps for dugeons!

## Server compatibility
Server compatibility has **never been easier!** You can just throw all of these mods into a 1.21.11 Fabric server and it will work!

## Recommendations
The pack includes several pre-installed texture and resource packs; enable them all for the best experience.

For an even better looting experience, download these mods from CurseForge and add them to the pack:
- [Loot integrations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-integrations)
- [Cupboard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard)
- [Loot integrations dungeons and taverns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-integrations-dungeons-and-taverns)
- [Loot integrations dungeons plus](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-integrations-dungeons-plus)
- [Loot integrations moogs voyager soaring end nether](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-integrations-moogs-voyager-soaring-end-nether)

## Important!
Beta Note: You may encounter bugs! I am actively fixing issues reported by our playtesters to keep things running smoothly.

Credits: Shout out to Amnesia for the awesome modpack name!

---
ScreenShots on the gallery tab!

Enjoy your Minecraft with style.
